use_cases: Display event information with date, time, and location details in a visually organized card layout
Showcase upcoming events on event discovery or calendar pages
Present event summaries with images and action buttons for user engagement
List events in a responsive grid or feed format for event platform applications
Highlight event details with animated entrance effects for visual appeal
ai_summary: An event card component that displays event information including heading, description, formatted date, location, and time. Features Framer Motion animations for smooth entrance effects, Lucide icons for visual indicators, and a responsive design using Tailwind/shadcn patterns. Includes an action button for user interaction and proper accessibility attributes. Ideal for event listing pages, calendar views, and event discovery interfaces.
